No. D-699O of2OtS { \ For hcaring of main casc. 28.03.2016. None present for petitioner. Mr. Dilawar Hussain, standing counsel. Mr. Asadullah Lashari, State dounsel. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, A.p.G. Mr Habib Ahmed, Advocate for pakistan Rangers. Mr. Ali Haider Saieem, A.p.G. Mr. Amanullah Zard,art, Focal person, Home Department. This petition was filed on 26.10.2015 and since then neither the petitioner nor her counsel has ever made appearance in this case. It appears that the petitioner and her counsel are not interested in pursuing the matter. The petition therefore stands dismissed for non- prosecution.
